shortDescription: Updated 3-bedroom bungalow in Willowdale offering single-level living and a finished basement.
fullDescription: Welcome to 50 Kingsbridge Garden Circle in the vibrant Willowdale neighbourhood. This inviting bungalow offers the ease of single-level living with a generous lot and private garden. The main living area boasts an open-concept design with pot lights and a cosy gas fireplace. The kitchen has been fully renovated with soft-close cabinetry, stone counters, and a breakfast bar. Upstairs, 3 bright bedrooms include a primary retreat with ensuite and double closets. Smart-home features, updated plumbing, and a newer roof provide peace of mind for years to come. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Modern eat-in kitchen with stainless steel appliances
Steps to TTC subway and streetcar
